offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed cash flow causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reminders instead of manual follow-ups and reminders.
problem: Delayed cash flow due to unpaid invoices.

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing invoices
